Class JavacExtension

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.plugins.javac.JavacExtension
All Implemented Interfaces:
KeYSelectionListener, KeYGuiExtension, KeYGuiExtension.Startup, KeYGuiExtension.StatusLine
public class JavacExtension extends Object implements KeYGuiExtension, KeYGuiExtension.StatusLine, KeYGuiExtension.Startup, KeYSelectionListener
Extensions provides Javac checks for recent-loaded Java files.

Provides an entry in the status line for access.

See Also:
  • JavaCompilerCheckFacade

      public void selectedNodeChanged(KeYSelectionEvent<Node> e)
      Description copied from interface: KeYSelectionListener
      focused node has changed.

      Do not modify the list of selection listeners in this callback!

      Specified by:
      selectedNodeChanged in interface KeYSelectionListener
      Parameters:
      e - event with details about the new selection

    • selectedProofChanged

      public void selectedProofChanged(KeYSelectionEvent<Proof> e)
      Description copied from interface: KeYSelectionListener
      the selected proof has changed (e.g. a new proof has been loaded or selected in the UI)

      Do not modify the list of selection listeners in this callback!

      Specified by:
      selectedProofChanged in interface KeYSelectionListener
      Parameters:
      e - event with details about the new selection
